features: Dove Powered by Plants Soothing Bamboo Body Lotion- Moisturising Body Cream developed from 99% natural origin ingredients that care for dry skin. 0% silicone and dyes
Dermatologically tested body lotion, rich in active ingredients with bamboo binding moisture in the skin
Everyday Dove Powered by Plants body lotion provides a hydrating effect for up to 48 hours
Dove body lotion with plant-based hydrating ingredients, for example shea butter, and a fragrance of 100% natural origin
A vegan body lotion that is COSMOS Natural certified by EcoCert, and PETA Cruelty-Free certified
description: Discover Dove Powered by Plants Soothing Bamboo Body Lotion. The lightweight, creamy and moisturising body lotion is rich in ingredients originating from the plant kingdom and takes advantage of the power of nature to offer you an extraordinary skin care product. The mild and quick-absorbing formula of this vegan and PETA Cruelty-Free* certified body lotion is formulated with 99% ingredients of natural origin and 0% silicone and dyes. It is also dermatologically tested and mild on all skin types. If you are looking for a product of natural origin that provides you with a healthy skin that radiates with luster, our body lotion is a perfect choice. Dove has enriched it with ingredients from the plant kingdom such as moisturizing shea butter and coconut oil to give you visibly renewed, soft skin. It also contains lavender essential oil with a gentle, soothing fragrance that gives you a peaceful moment every time you use it. Squeeze a generous amount of Dove Powered by Plants Soothing Bamboo Body Lotion and massage it into your skin until it is completely absorbed. No matter when applying your body lotion or body cream, your skin will love it. Use the products immediately after a relaxing bath to take care of your skin a little extra. For over thirty years, we have been distancing animal testing during the safety testing of our products and ingredients, and we have established a policy that prohibits animal testing anywhere around the world. All Dove products are just like this body lotion equipped with PETA's Cruelty-Free logo. *Globally, Dove does not test animals, even where animal testing is required. Cruelty-free certified by PETA. For more information, please refer to our website. - Dove Powered by Plants Soothing Bamboo Body Lotion has an intense moisturizing and softening effect- Moisturising body cream developed from 99% natural origin ingredients that care for dry skin. 0% silicone and dyes- Dermatologically tested body lotion rich in active ingredients with bamboo that bind moisture in the skin- The Everyday Dove Powered by Plants body lotion provides a hydrating effect for up to 48 hours- Dove body lotion with plant-based moisturising ingredients, such as shea butter, and a fragrance of 100% natural origin- ECOCERT, COSMOS NATURAL- & PETA Cruelty-Free* certified body lotion that is also vegan*Globally, Dove doesn't test animals, even in the countries where animal testing is required. Cruelty-free certified by PETA. You can find more information on our website.
